title: GEANZ Standards and Guidance Catalogue
description: Comprehensive catalogue of New Zealand government digital standards and guidance for service design, business architecture, system transformation, and digital development. Provides normative requirements (MUST, SHOULD, COULD) for government organisations undertaking digital initiatives.

source.page_title: GEANZ Standards and Guidance Catalogue | NZ Digital government
